headline_en: AI builders focused on agent security, compute scarcity, and the changing shape of product and engineering work.
headline_zh: AI 从业者今天的焦点集中在 agent 安全、compute 供给紧张，以及产品和工程工作的重塑。

items.en: Box CEO Aaron Levie argued that frontier-level cybersecurity models will become open and broadly available, including outside the U.S. His strategic point: gating advanced models may not make the U.S. safer if competitors catch up anyway, and could instead disadvantage domestic builders. He framed the better path as staying at the frontier and shaping future AI architectures.
items.zh: Box CEO Aaron Levie 认为，frontier 级别的网络安全模型很快会开源并广泛可得，包括在美国之外。他的战略判断是：如果竞争对手无论如何都会追上来，限制先进模型发布未必会让美国更安全，反而可能削弱本土开发者。他认为更好的路径是持续站在 frontier，并主导未来 AI 架构的演进。

items.en: Claude Code's Boris Cherny said AI-era product teams may be reorganizing around five archetypes rather than classic job functions: Prototyper, Builder, Sweeper, Grower, and Maintainer. He sees these patterns inside the Claude Code team, with people often spanning multiple roles across engineering, product, design, and data science. His useful frame: pre-PMF products need more prototyping and building, growing products need builders and growers, and mature products need sweepers, growers, and maintainers.
items.zh: Claude Code 的 Boris Cherny 说，AI 时代的产品团队可能会围绕五类角色重新组织，而不是传统职能：Prototyper、Builder、Sweeper、Grower 和 Maintainer。他在 Claude Code 团队中看到了这些模式，而且工程、产品、设计和 data science 成员往往会跨越多个角色。这个框架的关键在于：pre-PMF 产品更需要 prototyping 和 building，增长中的产品更需要 builders 和 growers，成熟产品则更需要 sweepers、growers 和 maintainers。

items.en: OpenAI's Thibault Sottiaux said the Codex team was in a Sunday war room investigating reports of unusual usage-limit drains. As the investigation continued, OpenAI reset everyone's Codex usage limits and said users who had recently used a reset would receive more manual resets after the investigation concludes.
items.zh: OpenAI 的 Thibault Sottiaux 表示，Codex 团队周日进入 war room，排查部分用户反馈的异常 usage-limit 消耗问题。在调查进行期间，OpenAI 重置了所有人的 Codex 使用额度，并表示如果用户刚用过 reset，调查结束后还会获得更多 manual resets。

items.role: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people
items.en: Peter Yang highlighted how Anthropic PMs use agents to get closer to the product. Quoting Jess, product lead for Claude Managed Agents, he said codebase access lets PMs track PRs, merges, and deployments directly instead of constantly asking engineers for status. The deeper point is that agents can make product roles more technically embedded without turning every PM into an engineer.
items.zh: Peter Yang 强调了 Anthropic PM 如何用 agents 更贴近产品。他引用 Claude Managed Agents product lead Jess 的说法：访问 codebase 可以让 PM 直接跟踪 PR、merge 和 deployment，而不是不断向工程师询问进度。更深一层的意思是，agents 能让产品角色更深入技术现场，同时不必把每个 PM 都变成工程师。

items.en: Builder Zara Zhang argued that product work needs much more explanation and distribution than many builders expect: for every hour spent building, spend two explaining, demonstrating, selling, and teaching. She framed this as part of building itself, because contact with reality improves the product.
items.zh: Builder Zara Zhang 认为，产品工作需要比很多 builders 预期更多的解释和分发：每花一小时做产品，就应该花两小时解释、演示、销售和教学。她把这视为构建过程的一部分，因为与现实接触会反过来改进产品。

items.en: Claude Code's Thariq suggested coding agents may change the economics of working with legacy codebases or porting them. He raised the point in response to a Riot-related item, asking whether agentic coding is making previously painful engineering migration work newly viable.
items.zh: Claude Code 的 Thariq 提出，coding agents 可能正在改变处理或迁移 legacy codebase 的工程成本。他是在回应一条与 Riot 相关的内容时提出这一点，询问 agentic coding 是否让过去很痛苦的迁移工作变得更可行。

items.en: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch gave a crisp builder-branding take: you do not need a LinkedIn profile as much as you need a page on your own website that describes and links to what you shipped. The practical message is that proof-of-work beats résumé surfaces for technical credibility.
items.zh: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch 给出了一个简洁的 builder 品牌观点：你不需要 LinkedIn，至少不如需要在自己的网站上放一个页面，说明并链接到你真正 ship 过的东西。实际含义是，对于技术可信度来说，proof-of-work 比简历式页面更有说服力。

items.title: How we contain Claude across products
items.en: Anthropic Engineering: How we contain Claude across products explains how Anthropic limits agent blast radius across claude.ai, Claude Code, and Claude Cowork as models get more capable and access expands. The central lesson is blunt: model-layer defenses help, but containment at the environment layer is what holds when prompts, users, or tool outputs go wrong. Anthropic says Claude Code users approved roughly 93% of permission prompts, prompting auto mode and sandboxing work that reduced permission prompts by 84%; it also says Claude Opus 4.7 held prompt-injection attack success to roughly 0.1% on single attempts and 5-6% after 100 adaptive attempts on Gray Swan's benchmark. The post is unusually concrete about failures: pre-trust config execution, a red-team phish that exfiltrated AWS credentials in 24 of 25 retries, an approved-domain exfiltration path through api.anthropic.com, and VM isolation that blocked enterprise EDR visibility. Its practical guidance: treat allowlists as capability grants, resolve symlinks before path validation, distrust external content even from trusted tools, and match isolation strength to whether the user can meaningfully supervise the agent.
items.zh: Anthropic Engineering: How we contain Claude across products 解释了 Anthropic 如何在 claude.ai、Claude Code 和 Claude Cowork 中限制 agent 的 blast radius，因为模型能力和访问权限都在扩大。核心教训很直接：model-layer defenses 有用，但当 prompt、用户或 tool output 出问题时，真正兜底的是 environment layer 的 containment。Anthropic 表示 Claude Code 用户会批准大约 93% 的权限请求，这推动了 auto mode 和 sandboxing，后者让 permission prompts 减少了 84%；它还称 Claude Opus 4.7 在 Gray Swan benchmark 上把单次 prompt-injection attack success 控制在约 0.1%，100 次 adaptive attempts 后约为 5-6%。这篇文章对失败案例讲得很具体：trust prompt 前的 config 执行、一次 red-team phish 在 25 次重试中 24 次成功 exfiltrate AWS credentials、通过 api.anthropic.com 这个 approved domain 的 exfiltration，以及 VM isolation 让企业 EDR 无法观察内部的问题。它的实践建议是：把 allowlist 视为 capability grant，path validation 前先解析 symlink，即使来自 trusted tools 也不要信任 external content，并根据用户是否能有效监督 agent 来匹配 isolation 强度。

items.source: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck
items.title: The GPU Myth: State of AI Compute 2026 | Stephen Balaban
items.en: The Takeaway: Lambda cofounder and CTO Stephen Balaban thinks the AI compute market is still underbuilt, because demand keeps expanding as models turn money into software and scaling laws keep holding. Balaban argues GPU cloud is not a commodity business; it is a vertically integrated stack spanning land, power, data-center construction, HPC networking, storage, orchestration software, financing, and customer utilization. His sharpest correction to the market narrative is that H100s bought in 2023 can lease for more today than when Lambda first deployed them, because usable economic life is longer than skeptics assumed and demand remains intense. As he puts it, 'The people who are the naysayers, you're gonna throw these GPUs out in five years, are completely wrong.' He also makes the case that AI data centers are less latency-sensitive than old cloud regions for many agentic workloads, where cost per token matters more than geography. On agents, he is bullish where feedback is concrete: software, CAD, simulation, and other verifiable domains. He is more skeptical of vague agent workflows that lack automated tests or clear traction signals. His longer-range bet is 'neural software,' where models do not just write code but become the live software interface, with mass adoption perhaps a decade or more away.
items.zh: The Takeaway：Lambda cofounder and CTO Stephen Balaban 认为 AI compute 市场仍然供给不足，因为随着模型把 money 变成 software，且 scaling laws 继续有效，需求还在扩张。Balaban 认为 GPU cloud 不是 commodity business，而是一套垂直整合的 stack，横跨 land、power、data-center construction、HPC networking、storage、orchestration software、financing 和 customer utilization。他对市场叙事最有力的修正是：Lambda 在 2023 年购买的 H100，现在的出租价格可能比最初部署时更高，因为 GPU 的 economic usable life 比怀疑者想象得更长，而需求依然强劲。用他的话说，'The people who are the naysayers, you're gonna throw these GPUs out in five years, are completely wrong.' 他还认为，对很多 agentic workloads 来说，AI data centers 没有传统 cloud regions 那么 latency-sensitive，cost per token 往往比地理位置更重要。对于 agents，他看好反馈明确的领域：software、CAD、simulation 和其他可验证场景。对于缺乏 automated tests 或清晰 traction signals 的模糊 agent workflows，他更谨慎。他更长期的押注是 'neural software'，也就是模型不只是写代码，而是成为实时的软件界面，但大规模采用可能还需要十年或更久。

items.title: Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection
items.en: Introduces RSEA, a frozen-policy LLM agent that recursively rewrites its strategy, skills, and playbook, then keeps only changes that improve held-out performance.
items.zh: 提出 RSEA，一种 frozen-policy LLM agent，会递归改写自己的 strategy、skills 和 playbook，并只保留能提升 held-out performance 的改动。

items.title: Data and Evaluation Closed-Loop for Model Capability Enhancement
items.en: Proposes capability slices to connect benchmark failures back to the data domains and quality labels that may fix them, turning LLM capability improvement into a tighter data-evaluation loop.
items.zh: 提出 capability slices，把 benchmark failure 连接回可能修复它们的数据领域和质量标签，让 LLM capability improvement 形成更紧密的 data-evaluation loop。

items.title: GPTNT: Benchmarking Real-Time Collaboration Between Multimodal Agents on Keep Talking And Nobody Explodes
items.en: Builds GPTNT, a benchmark based on Keep Talking And Nobody Explodes, to test multimodal agents under real-time pressure, asymmetric information, and imperfect communication.
items.zh: 构建 GPTNT，一个基于 Keep Talking And Nobody Explodes 的 benchmark，用来测试 multimodal agents 在实时压力、信息不对称和沟通不完美条件下的协作能力。

items.title: Developmental Trajectories of Situation Modeling and Mentalizing in Transformer Language Models
items.en: Tracks false-belief and mental-state reasoning across Olmo2 and Pythia training stages, finding that these behaviors depend on scale, emerge late in pretraining, and improve with post-training.
items.zh: 追踪 Olmo2 和 Pythia 不同训练阶段中的 false-belief 和 mental-state reasoning，发现这些行为依赖模型规模，在 pretraining 后期才出现，并会通过 post-training 得到改善。

items.title: Spectral Perturbation of the Empirical Fisher Information Matrix under Weight Quantization
items.en: Studies how input shift and weight quantization perturb the empirical Fisher Information Matrix, with theory for when dominant curvature increases relative to a calibration baseline.
items.zh: 研究 input shift 和 weight quantization 如何扰动 empirical Fisher Information Matrix，并分析 dominant curvature 何时会相对 calibration baseline 上升。

items.title: Adaptive Iterative Hard Thresholding for Online High-dimensional Quantile Regression
items.en: Presents AIHT, an online sparse quantile-regression method that delays thresholding early for support discovery and increases it later for stable refinement.
items.zh: 提出 AIHT，一种 online sparse quantile-regression 方法，早期延迟 thresholding 以发现 support，后期提高 thresholding 频率以稳定 refinement。

items.title: Variance Reduction for Stochastic Gradient Generalized Non-reversible Langevin Monte Carlo Algorithms
items.en: Analyzes stochastic-gradient non-reversible Langevin Monte Carlo estimators and derives variance characterizations that motivate control-variate-style reduction methods.
items.zh: 分析 stochastic-gradient non-reversible Langevin Monte Carlo estimators，并推导 variance characterization，为 control-variate-style reduction methods 提供依据。

items.title: Generating in the Limit with Infinitely Many Hallucinations
items.en: Recasts language generation in the limit as a recall-precision tradeoff, formalizing how broad coverage can come with infinitely many invalid generations.
items.zh: 把 language generation in the limit 重新表述为 recall-precision tradeoff，形式化说明更广覆盖如何可能伴随无限多 invalid generations。

items.title: Extracting Knowledge from an Arabic-English Machine-Readable Dictionary Using Information Extraction
items.en: Uses n-gram and KWIC pattern analysis to extract morphological, syntactic, and semantic lexical information from the Arabic-English Al-Mawrid dictionary.
items.zh: 使用 n-gram 和 KWIC pattern analysis，从 Arabic-English Al-Mawrid dictionary 中抽取 morphology、syntax 和 semantics 相关的 lexical information。

items.title: Role confusion: sounding like the cause is indistinguishable from being it.
items.en: LessWrong: Role confusion: sounding like the cause is indistinguishable from being it replicates the direction of Prompt Injection as Role Confusion but finds the causal story harder to establish. The author reports that activation steering was too weak to move behavior, while activation patching did move behavior but not specifically, since a random perturbation of equal size did the same. The useful takeaway is cautionary: prompt injection may look mechanistically neat, but current interventions may not yet isolate the cause cleanly.
items.zh: LessWrong: Role confusion: sounding like the cause is indistinguishable from being it 复现了 Prompt Injection as Role Confusion 的主要方向，但发现其 causal story 更难坐实。作者报告说，activation steering 太弱，无法改变行为；activation patching 的确改变了行为，但并不具备特异性，因为同等大小的随机扰动也会产生类似效果。关键 takeaway 是谨慎：prompt injection 看起来可能有清晰的 mechanistic explanation，但当前 intervention 还未必能干净地隔离原因。

items.title: DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions
items.en: Hugging Face published DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions. The provided data includes only the title and URL, so the safe signal is the topic itself: a transformer approach for modeling density and score across distributions.
items.zh: Hugging Face 发布了 DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions。给定数据只有标题和 URL，因此能安全提炼的信号是主题本身：一种用于跨 distributions 建模 density 和 score 的 transformer 方法。

items.title: The Slogan Strikes Again
items.en: LessWrong: The Slogan Strikes Again revisits the idea that 'Compression is Intelligence' through the lens of LLMs. The post treats the slogan as a useful but non-literal intuition for why training a model to compress human text into weights can produce behavior that looks intelligent within the training domain.
items.zh: LessWrong: The Slogan Strikes Again 通过 LLM 重新审视 'Compression is Intelligence' 这个说法。文章把它视为有用但不能字面理解的直觉，用来解释为什么把人类文本压缩进模型权重的训练目标，会在训练领域内产生看起来像智能的行为。

items.title: Malicious Perplexity Chrome Extension Intercepted Searches and Address Bar Input
items.en: The Hacker News reported that Microsoft found a malicious Chrome extension impersonating Perplexity. It logged searches and address-bar input through an attacker-controlled server before redirecting users to real results, and Google removed it after responsible disclosure.
items.zh: The Hacker News 报道称，Microsoft 发现了一个冒充 Perplexity 的恶意 Chrome extension。它会把搜索和地址栏输入记录到攻击者控制的服务器，然后再把用户重定向到真实结果；Google 在 responsible disclosure 后将其移除。

items.title: Oracle E-Business Suite Flaw CVE-2026-46817 Actively Exploited in the Wild
items.en: The Hacker News reported active exploitation of CVE-2026-46817, a critical Oracle E-Business Suite vulnerability with a CVSS score of 9.8. The flaw affects Oracle Payments and is described as an improper privilege management and authentication issue that could allow takeover of vulnerable instances.
items.zh: The Hacker News 报道 CVE-2026-46817 正在被 actively exploited in the wild，这是一个影响 Oracle E-Business Suite 的 critical vulnerability，CVSS score 为 9.8。该漏洞影响 Oracle Payments，被描述为 improper privilege management 和 authentication 问题，可能导致 vulnerable instances 被接管。

items.title: ARR review quality
items.en: A r/LanguageTechnology post says ARR review quality has dropped noticeably across more than eight submissions and similar reports from colleagues. The author points to inexperienced reviewers, topic-mismatched assignments, and review-rubric problems, asking how the NLP community can reduce low-quality reviews and randomness in assignments.
items.zh: 一篇 r/LanguageTechnology 帖子称，在 8 篇以上 ARR 投稿经历以及同事反馈中，ARR review quality 明显下降。作者指出问题可能来自 inexperienced reviewers、topic-mismatched assignments 和 review-rubric problems，并询问 NLP 社区如何减少低质量 reviews 和分配随机性。
